James Milton assesses all 18 matches in the Champions League this week and delivers a score prediction for every game.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, PSG and Man City under pressure to ignite Champions League campaigns
arts.sum: The Italian club, which won the Europa League last season, was beaten 2-0 by Madrid in the UEFA Super Cup in August but is now among the form teams in Europe with nine straight wins and no losses in 14 games in all competitions. In past Champions League competitions, the sixth round of games would wrap up the group stage and Madrid — the 15-time European champions — would typically be fielding some fringe players with a spot in the last 16 tied up.
